scene.message: Yukino: Michiko...{nl} I can't forgive her...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Isn't this good{nl} medicine for Toro and Kuroori?{waitkey}{clearbox}Ayase can't stand those two...{waitkey}{ret}
Toro: I can't... anymore...{waitkey}{clearbox}Ohgeh!!{wait_fr:30}{nl} Uoegh!!!{wait_fr:30}{waitkey}{clearbox}I-{wait_fr:30}I'll die{wait_fr:30}, gonna die...{waitkey}{ret}
Kuroori: Ze... ze...{waitkey}{clearbox}Hii... hii...{waitkey}{ret}
